dlm.lifecyclepolicy.fastrestorerule.CfnA: **[Snapshot policies only]** Specifies a rule for enabling fast snapshot restore for snapshots created by snapshot policies. You can enable fast snapshot restore based on either a count or a time interval.

dlm.lifecyclepolicy.fastrestorerule.Avai.Description: The Availability Zones in which to enable fast snapshot restore.

dlm.lifecyclepolicy.fastrestorerule.Coun.Description: The number of snapshots to be enabled with fast snapshot restore.

dlm.lifecyclepolicy.fastrestorerule.Inte.Description: The amount of time to enable fast snapshot restore. The maximum is 100 years. This is equivalent to 1200 months, 5200 weeks, or 36500 days.
The unit of time for enabling fast snapshot restore.
